commands: vp install # should install packages first
vp pm prune --help # should show help
vp pm prune && cat package.json # should prune extraneous dependencies
vp pm prune --prod && cat package.json # should prune dev dependencies
vp pm prune --no-optional && cat package.json # should prune optional dependencies
vp pm prune --prod --no-optional && cat package.json # should prune both dev and optional dependencies
vp pm prune -- --loglevel=warn && cat package.json # should support pass through arguments
